phase_8_closeout.summary: Phase 8 (Entity resolution) closed 2026-07-13. Waves 1-6 complete: Store foundation (put_entity/get_entity/link_entity/get_entity_links/get_all_entities), LLM-based NER in apps/triage/entities.py, triage worker integration with timeout guard, vault projection (row-based and store-backed Entity Graph.md), mE5-large threshold re-validation at T*=0.92, and contract/regression tests. Production code now ships LINK_THRESHOLD=0.92 in apps/triage/entities.py and libs/store/src/store/_postgres.py::find_similar_entity. The store-backed Entity Graph.md displays language-tagged aliases (e.g. 'NATO (en), НАТО (ru)') and renders entity type/language consistently with the row-based graph.

completed_tasks.name: 08-02 Waves 2-6 — LLM NER, worker integration, vault projection, entity graph, threshold validation, tests

human_actions_pending: Operator decision: continue straight into Phase 9 (RAG recall).

decisions.rationale: Real mE5-large vector re-validation (backlog 999.3) recommended 0.92 via conservative overmerge==0 fallback; 0.85 was the old R3 bge-m3-misparse value and is no longer used.
Entity Graph.md projection should show actual aliases (mention + lang) rather than a bare count; alias_count removed as redundant with len(aliases).

decisions.decision: Row-based and store-backed Entity Graph both render type and language
decisions.rationale: Consistency between the two graph formats; type/lang are canonical entity attributes.

decisions.decision: Entity NER in triage worker guarded by asyncio.wait_for timeout
decisions.rationale: Prevents a hung LLM NER call from blocking verdict.ready publication per ADR-004 R5 prohibition.

decisions.decision: Cyrillic↔Latin transliteration added to scripts/validate_entity_threshold.py for cross-language corpus validation
decisions.rationale: Enables --corpus-from-postgres to pair Cyrillic and Latin mentions of the same entity (e.g. NATO / НАТО); live run validated the cross-language bar at T*=0.92 (GO).

prerequisite_commits.purpose: test(entities): add mocked _corpus_from_postgres integration test for cross-script pairing
feat(entities): add Cyrillic↔Latin transliteration to entity threshold validator
Phase 8 Waves 5-6 — store-backed entity graph and threshold validation
fix(bus): repair RabbitMQ test hang and topology cleanup
feat(entities): display language-tagged aliases in store-backed Entity Graph.md
refactor(store): remove redundant alias_count from get_all_entities API
feat(vault): render type and language in row-based Entity Graph

next_action: Phase 8 is complete. Phase 9 (RAG recall) is ready to execute; 09-PLAN.md and 09-CONTEXT.md exist in .planning/phases/09-rag-recall/. Begin via /gsd-execute-phase 9. Alternatively, push the pending Phase 7/8 commits to origin/main first.
context_notes: Phase 8 Waves 1-6 closed. LINK_THRESHOLD=0.92 shipped in apps/triage/entities.py and libs/store/src/store/_postgres.py. Store.get_all_entities() returns sorted language-tagged aliases; alias_count removed from API. vault_writer renders type and language in both row-based and store-backed Entity Graph.md. Triage worker NER call protected by INFOTRIAGE_ENTITY_NER_TIMEOUT (default 15s). Cyrillic↔Latin transliteration added to scripts/validate_entity_threshold.py; live --corpus-from-postgres run GO at T*=0.92. Full pytest suite green: 405 passed, 43 skipped.
